summary: Help Scout is an intuitive, affordable customer support platform that brings every support channel—email, live chat, social, and more—into one shared inbox, with AI tools that resolve 73% of interactions on average. It's built for growing teams that need real collaboration features, actionable analytics, and self-service tools without the complexity or cost of enterprise alternatives. More than 12,000 companies use Help Scout, and 80% of customers stay for 4+ years.

tiers.name: Standard
highlights: Multiple knowledge bases, live chat, Instagram, and Messenger
1 basic SLA policy, basic workflows (up to 500)
AI Assist (expand, shorten, edit, translate) — unlimited

tiers.name: Plus
highlights: Advanced workflows (up to 500), 2 advanced SLA policies
API at 400 calls/minute; SSO/SAML and IP restrictions as add-ons

tiers.name: Pro
highlights: 10 Inboxes, 5 Docs sites; unlimited workflows and SLA policies
Up to 50 light users; multiple routing types (round robin + load balanced)
Dedicated onboarding specialist and strategic account manager
API at 800 calls/minute; preferred pricing on Aircall

discounts: Nonprofit and B Corporation discounts via the Help Scout for Good program
Startup plan available for early-stage companies
AI Answers pre-paid discounts available (up to 33% savings)
pricing.trial: 15-day free trial on Standard and Plus plans, no credit card required. Pro plan trial available via sales team. AI Answers includes a 3-month free trial (unlimited resolutions) for all new accounts.

features.name: Shared Inbox
features.description: Centralizes email, live chat, social, and phone conversations in one collaborative workspace where teammates can assign, comment, and respond without duplicate replies. Supports multiple inboxes for different teams or products.

features.name: AI Answers (Chatbot)
features.description: An autonomous AI assistant that resolves customer questions instantly using your knowledge base, website, and custom sources—averaging a 73% resolution rate. Priced at $0.75 per resolution with monthly spending caps available.

features.name: AI Assist (Inbox Assistant)
features.description: In-line AI tools that let agents expand, shorten, edit, or translate text with a single click, and summarize long conversation threads instantly. Available to all paid users at no additional charge.

features.name: AI Drafts
features.description: Generates full reply drafts based on past conversations and help content, giving agents a ready-to-review starting point. Included as unlimited drafts on Plus and Pro.

features.name: Knowledge Base (Docs)
features.description: A no-code, branded self-service help center that customers can search 24/7; one customer reported a 58% reduction in email volume after improving their Docs site. Supports custom CSS, article ratings, and content-gap reporting via failed searches.

features.name: Beacon (Embeddable Support Hub)
features.description: A customizable widget you can place anywhere on your website or in-app that surfaces help articles, live chat, and AI Answers so customers get help without leaving the page. Supports contact forms, proactive messages, and previous conversation history.

features.name: Proactive Messages
features.description: Sends targeted in-app or on-site messages (banners, modals, NPS surveys, standard messages) based on triggers like URL, time on page, or number of visits to engage customers at the right moment.

features.name: Workflows & Automation
features.description: Rule-based automations that handle assigning, tagging, prioritizing, and replying to conversations so agents stay focused on customers rather than inbox management. Standard allows 500 workflows; Pro allows unlimited.

features.name: Reporting & Analytics
features.description: Pre-built dashboards cover conversation volume, response time, handle time, team performance, CSAT, and Docs search data; custom report filters and CSV exports are available on paid plans. Standard has 2-year history; Plus and Pro have all-time history.

features.name: Service Level Agreements (SLAs)
features.description: Sets and tracks response and resolution time targets across conversations to keep teams accountable to key accounts. Standard includes 1 basic policy; Plus includes 2 advanced policies; Pro includes unlimited SLA policies.

features.name: Company Management
features.description: Groups contacts and conversations by company so agents see full account history and context—not just individual threads—right in the conversation sidebar.

features.name: SSO / SAML
features.description: Allows teams to sign into Help Scout using their existing identity provider via any SAML-compatible SSO system. Available as an add-on on Plus; included natively on Pro.

features.name: HIPAA Compliance
features.description: Help Scout maintains ongoing HIPAA compliance and can process, maintain, and store protected health information (PHI) for covered entities after a BAA is signed. Available as an add-on on Pro.

features.name: Light User Seats
features.description: Lets developers, PMs, or other occasional contributors view and comment on conversations without consuming a full paid seat. Pro plans include up to 50 light users.

certifications: HIPAA compliant (BAA required; available on Pro)
security.uptime: 99.99% (stated on site footer and status page)

api.rateLimit: Standard: 200 calls/minute; Plus: 400 calls/minute; Pro: 800 calls/minute

customerProofPoints.metric: Average response time under 1 hour even with 100k+ users; resolves 60% of conversations on first email; 95% customer happiness score

customerProofPoints.quote: It takes a lot of manual effort, busy work, and aggravation out of the support process, so we can focus on what really matters.
customerProofPoints.metric: Help Scout boosts retention rate of new customers by 26%; used for 9 years across 700k+ users
Handles 80,000+ emails per year on 1 platform; managed a 22% spike in email volume; serves 27,000+ students and 6,000 employees

customerProofPoints.quote: We've reduced our workload by 50%, making our team twice as productive.
customerProofPoints.metric: Automated workflows reduced support workload by 50%
Reduced email volume by 58% while achieving a 93 CSAT score

customerProofPoints.quote: Help Scout helps us strike that balance of empowering customers to find answers on their own, while making sure our team is right there when they need us.
customerProofPoints.metric: Handles over 15% of conversations automatically with AI Answers
